mapper.select: SELECT role_user.user_id as resId, role_user.modified_at as addedAt, role_user.add_user_id as addUserId, club.username as resName, club.deleted as resDeleted FROM role_user JOIN club ON role_user.user_id = club.id WHERE role_user.role_id = #{reqId} AND role_user.deleted = #{deleted}

SELECT club.id as resId, club.username as resName, club.deleted as resDeleted FROM club LEFT JOIN role_user ON club.id = role_user.user_id AND role_user.role_id = #{reqId} WHERE (role_user.user_id IS NULL OR role_user.deleted = #{deleted})

SELECT role_user.role_id as resId, role_user.modified_at as addedAt, role_user.add_user_id as addUserId, role.role_name as resName, role.deleted as resDeleted FROM role_user JOIN role ON role_user.role_id = role.id WHERE role_user.user_id = #{reqId} AND role_user.deleted = #{deleted}

SELECT role.id as resId, role.role_name as resName, role.deleted as resDeleted FROM role LEFT JOIN role_user ON role.id = role_user.role_id AND role_user.user_id = #{reqId} WHERE (role_user.role_id IS NULL OR role_user.deleted = #{deleted})
